---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .svc-hero{background:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);color:#fff;padding:2.5rem 2rem;}
  .svc-hero h1{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;margin:0 0 .4rem;}
  .svc-hero p{opacity:.7;margin:0;font-size:1rem;}
  .svc-wrap{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem 1.5rem 3rem;}
  .svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.25rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;}
  .svc-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .svc-card h3{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;margin:0 0 1rem;color:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);}
  .svc-full{grid-column:1/-1;}
  .svc-heatgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:.5rem;}
  .svc-tile{padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
  .svc-tile:hover{transform:translateX(4px);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
  .svc-tile.active{outline:2px solid var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);outline-offset:1px;}
  .svc-tile .svc-name{flex:1;}
  .svc-tile .svc-pct{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;white-space:nowrap;margin-left:.5rem;}
  .svc-tile .svc-count{font-size:.75rem;opacity:.7;margin-left:.25rem;}
  .svc-status{padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:1rem;background:rgba(201,162,39,.06);border-left:4px solid var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  #svc-map{width:100%;height:450px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);z-index:1;}
  .svc-legend{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:.75rem;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--map-text-muted);}
  .svc-legend-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;}
  .svc-legend-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;}
  .svc-detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:.5rem;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
  .svc-detail-item{padding:.5rem .75rem;background:var(--map-bg-section,#f5f4f0);border-radius:6px;font-size:.82rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
  .svc-detail-item .cnt{font-weight:700;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .svc-topbar{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;}
  .svc-metric{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .svc-metric .val{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .svc-metric .lbl{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--map-text-muted,#6b6b6b);margin-top:.15rem;}
  canvas{max-height:300px!important;}
  @media(max-width:768px){.svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} #svc-map{height:350px;}}
</style>

<section class="svc-hero">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
    <h1>Service Gap Intelligence</h1>
    <p>208,941 service records across 11,904 Tanzanian health facilities &mdash; identifying coverage gaps and service deserts</p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="svc-wrap">

  <div class="svc-status" id="svc-status">Loading Tanzania facility and service data...</div>

  <!-- Top metrics -->
  <div class="svc-topbar" id="svc-topbar"></div>

  <!-- Service heatgrid (clickable) -->
  <div class="svc-card svc-full" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
    <h3>Service Category Coverage <span style="font-weight:400;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--map-text-muted);">&mdash; click a category to explore</span></h3>
    <div class="svc-heatgrid" id="svc-heatgrid"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="svc-grid">
    <!-- Coverage bar chart -->
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3>Coverage Rate by Category</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-svc"></canvas>
    </div>

    <!-- Map: colored by selected category -->
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3 id="map-title">Map: General Clinical Services</h3>
      <div id="svc-map"></div>
      <div class="svc-legend">
        <div class="svc-legend-item"><div class="svc-legend-dot" style="background:#5a8a5a;"></div> Has Service</div>
        <div class="svc-legend-item"><div class="svc-legend-dot" style="background:#d45050;"></div> No Service</div>
        <div class="svc-legend-item"><div class="svc-legend-dot" style="background:#999;"></div> No Data</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Service detail breakdown for selected category -->
  <div class="svc-card svc-full" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
    <h3 id="detail-title">Specific Services: General Clinical Services</h3>
    <div class="svc-detail-grid" id="svc-detail-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="svc-grid">
    <!-- Region coverage for selected service -->
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3 id="region-chart-title">Regional Coverage: General Clinical Services</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-region" style="max-height:380px!important;"></canvas>
    </div>

    <!-- Facility type breakdown -->
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3>Facility Type Distribution</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-types"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var SVC_LABELS = {
    general_services:'General Clinical',
    malaria_diagnosis:'Malaria Diagnosis & Treatment',
    hiv_prevention:'HIV/AIDS Prevention',
    hiv_caretreatment:'HIV/AIDS Care & Treatment',
    therapeutics:'Therapeutics / Pharmacy',
    health_promotion:'Health Promotion',
    growth_nutrition:'Nutrition / Vaccination',
    diagnostic_services:'Diagnostic Services',
    support_services:'Support Services',
    ent_services:'ENT Services',
    radiology:'Radiology',
    emergency:'Emergency Preparedness',
    lab_serology:'Lab &mdash; Serology',
    lab_parasitology:'Lab &mdash; Parasitology',
    lab_clinicalchemistry:'Lab &mdash; Clinical Chemistry'
  };
  var SVC_KEYS = Object.keys(SVC_LABELS);

  function colorGrad(pct){
    if(pct>=70) return '#5a8a5a';
    if(pct>=40) return '#c9a227';
    if(pct>=15) return '#d48a27';
    return '#d45050';
  }

  var facilities = {};   // code -> facility object
  var svcByCode = {};    // code -> { category: Set of details }
  var svcCodes = new Set(); // codes that have service data
  var selectedCat = 'general_services';
  var map, markers = [];
  var chartSvc, chartRegion, chartTypes;

  // Status updates
  function setStatus(msg){ document.getElementById('svc-status').innerHTML = msg; }

  // Init map
  map = L.map('svc-map').setView([-6.5,35],6);
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png',{
    attribution:'&copy; OSM &copy; CARTO', maxZoom:18
  }).addTo(map);

  // Load data
  var loaded = {fac:false, svc:false};

  setStatus('Loading facility registry...');
  Papa.parse('data/tanzania/tanzania_standardized.csv',{
    download:true, header:true, skipEmptyLines:true,
    complete:function(res){
      res.data.forEach(function(r){
        if(r.facility_code && r.facility_name && r.facility_name !== 'facility_name'){
          // Nullify outlier coords
          var la = parseFloat(r.latitude), lo = parseFloat(r.longitude);
          if(!isNaN(la) && !isNaN(lo) && (la < -12 || la > -1 || lo < 29 || lo > 41)){
            r.latitude = ''; r.longitude = '';
          }
          facilities[r.facility_code] = r;
        }
      });
      loaded.fac = true;
      console.log('HealthScope Services: ' + Object.keys(facilities).length + ' facilities loaded');
      setStatus('Loaded ' + Object.keys(facilities).length + ' facilities. Loading service records...');
      if(loaded.svc) onReady();
    },
    error:function(err){ setStatus('Failed to load facility data: ' + err, 'error'); console.error(err); }
  });

  Papa.parse('data/tanzania/hf_services.csv',{
    download:true, header:true, skipEmptyLines:true,
    complete:function(res){
      var count = 0;
      res.data.forEach(function(r){
        if(!r.facility_code || !r.service_category) return;
        if(r.facility_code === 'facility_code') return;
        svcCodes.add(r.facility_code);
        if(!svcByCode[r.facility_code]) svcByCode[r.facility_code] = {};
        if(!svcByCode[r.facility_code][r.service_category]){
          svcByCode[r.facility_code][r.service_category] = [];
        }
        svcByCode[r.facility_code][r.service_category].push(r.service_detail || r.service_group || '');
        count++;
      });
      loaded.svc = true;
      console.log('HealthScope Services: ' + count + ' service records for ' + svcCodes.size + ' facilities');
      if(loaded.fac) onReady();
    },
    error:function(err){ setStatus('Failed to load service data: ' + err); console.error(err); }
  });

  function onReady(){
    var totalFac = Object.keys(facilities).length;
    var totalSvc = svcCodes.size;
    var totalRecords = 0;
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){
      Object.values(cats).forEach(function(arr){ totalRecords += arr.length; });
    });

    setStatus('<strong>' + totalFac.toLocaleString() + '</strong> facilities loaded, <strong>' + totalSvc.toLocaleString() + '</strong> with service data (<strong>' + totalRecords.toLocaleString() + '</strong> service records)');

    renderTopbar(totalFac, totalSvc, totalRecords);
    renderHeatgrid();
    renderCoverageChart();
    renderMap(selectedCat);
    renderDetails(selectedCat);
    renderRegionChart(selectedCat);
    renderTypeChart();
  }

  function renderTopbar(totalFac, totalSvc, totalRecords){
    var covPct = Math.round(totalSvc / totalFac * 100);
    // Count categories present
    var catSet = new Set();
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){ Object.keys(cats).forEach(function(c){ catSet.add(c); }); });

    document.getElementById('svc-topbar').innerHTML =
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">' + totalFac.toLocaleString() + '</div><div class="lbl">Total Facilities</div></div>' +
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">' + totalSvc.toLocaleString() + '</div><div class="lbl">With Service Data</div></div>' +
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">' + covPct + '%</div><div class="lbl">Service Coverage</div></div>' +
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">' + totalRecords.toLocaleString() + '</div><div class="lbl">Service Records</div></div>' +
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">' + catSet.size + '</div><div class="lbl">Service Categories</div></div>' +
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">26</div><div class="lbl">Regions</div></div>';
  }

  function renderHeatgrid(){
    var totalWithSvc = svcCodes.size || 1;
    var html = '';
    SVC_KEYS.forEach(function(key){
      var count = 0;
      Object.keys(svcByCode).forEach(function(code){
        if(svcByCode[code][key]) count++;
      });
      var pct = Math.round(count / totalWithSvc * 100);
      var bg = colorGrad(pct);
      var active = key === selectedCat ? ' active' : '';
      html += '<div class="svc-tile' + active + '" data-cat="' + key + '" style="background:' + bg + '15;border-left:3px solid ' + bg + ';" onclick="window._selectCat(\'' + key + '\')">' +
        '<span class="svc-name">' + SVC_LABELS[key] + '</span>' +
        '<span class="svc-pct" style="color:' + bg + ';">' + pct + '%</span>' +
        '<span class="svc-count" style="color:' + bg + ';">(' + count.toLocaleString() + ')</span></div>';
    });
    document.getElementById('svc-heatgrid').innerHTML = html;
  }

  window._selectCat = function(cat){
    selectedCat = cat;
    renderHeatgrid();
    renderMap(cat);
    renderDetails(cat);
    renderRegionChart(cat);
    document.getElementById('map-title').innerHTML = 'Map: ' + SVC_LABELS[cat];
    document.getElementById('detail-title').innerHTML = 'Specific Services: ' + SVC_LABELS[cat];
    document.getElementById('region-chart-title').innerHTML = 'Regional Coverage: ' + SVC_LABELS[cat];
  };

  function renderCoverageChart(){
    var totalWithSvc = svcCodes.size || 1;
    var labels = [], values = [], colors = [];
    SVC_KEYS.forEach(function(key){
      var count = 0;
      Object.keys(svcByCode).forEach(function(code){ if(svcByCode[code][key]) count++; });
      var pct = Math.round(count / totalWithSvc * 100);
      labels.push(SVC_LABELS[key].replace('&mdash;','—'));
      values.push(pct);
      colors.push(colorGrad(pct));
    });
    if(chartSvc) chartSvc.destroy();
    chartSvc = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-svc'),{
      type:'bar',
      data:{labels:labels, datasets:[{label:'Coverage %',data:values,backgroundColor:colors,borderRadius:4}]},
      options:{indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},
        scales:{x:{max:100,grid:{display:false},ticks:{callback:function(v){return v+'%';}}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10}}}}}
    });
  }

  function renderMap(cat){
    markers.forEach(function(m){map.removeLayer(m);});
    markers = [];

    // Only show facilities that HAVE service data (reduces to ~11K)
    var codes = Object.keys(svcByCode);
    // Sample for performance
    var step = codes.length > 4000 ? Math.ceil(codes.length / 4000) : 1;
    var count = 0;

    codes.forEach(function(code, i){
      if(i % step !== 0) return;
      var f = facilities[code];
      if(!f) return;
      var lat = parseFloat(f.latitude), lon = parseFloat(f.longitude);
      // Validate Tanzania bounds
      if(isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lon) || lat < -12 || lat > -1 || lon < 29 || lon > 41) return;

      var hasSvc = svcByCode[code][cat] && svcByCode[code][cat].length > 0;
      var color = hasSvc ? '#5a8a5a' : '#d45050';

      var m = L.circleMarker([lat,lon],{
        radius:4, color:color, weight:1, opacity:0.7,
        fillColor:color, fillOpacity:0.5
      }).addTo(map);

      var details = '';
      if(hasSvc){
        details = '<br/><strong style="color:#5a8a5a;">Services:</strong><br/>' +
          svcByCode[code][cat].slice(0,5).map(function(d){return '&bull; '+d;}).join('<br/>');
        if(svcByCode[code][cat].length > 5) details += '<br/><em>+' + (svcByCode[code][cat].length-5) + ' more</em>';
      }

      m.bindPopup(
        '<strong>' + f.facility_name + '</strong><br/>' +
        '<span style="color:#6b6b6b;">' + (f.facility_type||'') + ' &bull; ' + (f.facility_ownership||'') + '</span><br/>' +
        '<span style="color:#6b6b6b;">' + (f.admin1||'') + '</span>' +
        details
      );
      markers.push(m);
      count++;
    });

    console.log('HealthScope: Rendered ' + count + ' markers for ' + cat);
    // Fit to Tanzania
    map.fitBounds([[-12, 29], [-1, 41]], {padding:[10,10]});
  }

  function renderDetails(cat){
    // Count each service_detail within the selected category
    var detailCounts = {};
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){
      if(!cats[cat]) return;
      cats[cat].forEach(function(d){
        detailCounts[d] = (detailCounts[d]||0) + 1;
      });
    });
    var entries = Object.entries(detailCounts).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];});
    var html = '';
    entries.forEach(function(e){
      html += '<div class="svc-detail-item"><span>' + e[0] + '</span><span class="cnt">' + e[1].toLocaleString() + '</span></div>';
    });
    if(!entries.length) html = '<div style="color:var(--map-text-muted);padding:1rem;">No service details available for this category.</div>';
    document.getElementById('svc-detail-grid').innerHTML = html;
  }

  function renderRegionChart(cat){
    // Count facilities with this service per region
    var regionTotal = {}, regionHas = {};
    Object.keys(facilities).forEach(function(code){
      var f = facilities[code];
      var region = f.admin1 || 'Unknown';
      regionTotal[region] = (regionTotal[region]||0) + 1;
      if(svcByCode[code] && svcByCode[code][cat]){
        regionHas[region] = (regionHas[region]||0) + 1;
      }
    });
    var entries = Object.keys(regionTotal).filter(function(r){return r!=='admin1'&&r!=='NA';})
      .map(function(r){
        return {region:r, total:regionTotal[r], has:regionHas[r]||0, pct:Math.round((regionHas[r]||0)/regionTotal[r]*100)};
      }).sort(function(a,b){return b.pct - a.pct;});

    if(chartRegion) chartRegion.destroy();
    chartRegion = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-region'),{
      type:'bar',
      data:{
        labels:entries.map(function(e){return e.region;}),
        datasets:[
          {label:'Has Service',data:entries.map(function(e){return e.has;}),backgroundColor:'#5a8a5a',borderRadius:4},
          {label:'No Service',data:entries.map(function(e){return e.total-e.has;}),backgroundColor:'#d4503033',borderRadius:4}
        ]
      },
      options:{
        indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,
        plugins:{legend:{position:'top',labels:{boxWidth:12,font:{size:11}}}},
        scales:{x:{stacked:true,grid:{display:false}},y:{stacked:true,grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10}}}}
      }
    });
  }

  function renderTypeChart(){
    var types = {};
    Object.values(facilities).forEach(function(f){
      var t = f.facility_type || 'Unknown';
      if(t === 'facility_type') return;
      types[t] = (types[t]||0)+1;
    });
    var entries = Object.entries(types).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,8);
    var COLORS = ['#c9a227','#5a7a9b','#5a8a5a','#d48a27','#8b5cf6','#5a9a8a','#6b6b6b','#d45050'];
    if(chartTypes) chartTypes.destroy();
    chartTypes = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-types'),{
      type:'doughnut',
      data:{labels:entries.map(function(e){return e[0];}),datasets:[{data:entries.map(function(e){return e[1];}),backgroundColor:COLORS,borderWidth:0}]},
      options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'right',labels:{boxWidth:12,font:{size:11}}}}}
    });
  }
})();
</script>
```
